name: My Mom's Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large fresh jalapeno, or more, chopped
1 cup mayonnaise or more as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes until soft but still firm. Allow to cool by covering with cool water; do not let them sit in hot water.
2. Peel and dice the cooled potatoes into a large bowl.
3. Add the chopped eggs, green onions, pickles, pimentos, and jalapeno (if desired) to the bowl.
4. Mix in the mayonnaise as needed to bind and combine all ingredients.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Smooth everything together in the bowl.
7. Sprinkle with paprika.
8. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
